description: Lifecycle hooks for dotnet/runtime — AI disclosure guardrails

preToolUse.bash: d=; while IFS= read -r l; do d=$d$l; done; case $d in *'gh pr create'*|*'gh pr comment'*|*'gh pr review'*|*'gh pr edit'*|*'gh pr merge'*|*'gh issue create'*|*'gh issue comment'*|*'gh issue edit'*|*'gh issue close'*|*github*) echo 'Include AI-generated content disclosure (> [!NOTE]) per copilot-instructions.md' >&2;; esac; :
preToolUse.powershell: $d = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); if ($d -match 'gh (pr|issue) (create|comment|review|edit|merge|close)' -or $d -match 'github') { [Console]::Error.WriteLine('Include AI-generated content disclosure (> [!NOTE]) per copilot-instructions.md') }
preToolUse.description: Remind about AI disclosure when posting to GitHub via gh CLI or MCP tools
